content.text: The Mixer view lets you see and adjust the volume levels of all tracks simultaneously. It's essential for balancing your mix.
Press the Mixer button to enter mixer view. The pads display the current level of each track as vertical meter columns.
In mixer view, tracks are arranged left to right:
Tap a column to select that track, then use the Filter knob to adjust its level. Or simply tap and drag on the pad column to set the level directly.
The display shows the exact dB value as you adjust levels for precise mixing.
In mixer view, press a track's column twice quickly to mute it. The column will dim to show it's muted. Tap again to unmute.
Mutes are temporary and not saved. They reset when you change patterns or power off.
When using the audio input, an additional column appears in the mixer for the external audio level. You can process external audio through the effects.
Mix levels are saved per-session. Each session can have completely different volume balances for its tracks.
